keys.title: Supplemental product practices
keys.body:
# Supplemental product practices

**Version:** 1.0

**Effective Date:** [INSERT DATE]

**Last Updated:** [INSERT DATE]

---

## 1. Purpose

This document supplements the [Terms of Service](/legal/terms-of-service/) and [Privacy Policy](/legal/privacy-policy/). It summarizes how **optional automation and assisted features** may rely on **subprocessors**, and the **oversight** expectations that apply when those features are enabled for your organization.

## 2. Subprocessors and configuration

- Assisted features may call **third-party services** under agreements that include confidentiality and data-protection terms appropriate for business SaaS.
- **Configuration and enablement** are controlled by your plan, contract, and administrator settings.

## 3. Human review

Users should **review** outputs from assisted features before relying on them for material decisions, consistent with the [Terms of Service](/legal/terms-of-service/) (Section 8).

## 4. Related documents

- [Privacy Policy](/legal/privacy-policy/)
- [Data Processing Agreement](/legal/data-processing-agreement/)
- [Terms of Service](/legal/terms-of-service/)
